<style>

#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_group:after,

#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .img_at_left3:before {content:''; display: table; clear: both;}

#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 * {-webkit-box-sizing: border-box; -moz-box-sizing: border-box; box-sizing: border-box; font:14px arial,helvetica,sans-serif; line-height: 1.4em;}



/* Picture as Background */
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content .bg1 {width:100%; height:20px; margin-bottom:10px; background:url("//c1.neweggimages.com/BizIntell/item/ACCS%20-%20PC/Liquid%20Water%20Cooling/35-846-069/banner.png") no-repeat center center; background-size:cover;}	
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content .bg2 {background:url("//c1.neweggimages.com/BizIntell/item/ACCS%20-%20PC/Liquid%20Water%20Cooling/35-846-069/banner.png") repeat-y center center; background-size:cover;}	
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content .bg3 {background:url("//c1.neweggimages.com/BizIntell/item/ACCS%20-%20PC/Liquid%20Water%20Cooling/35-846-069/banner.png") no-repeat fixed center; color:white; padding:3em 2em;}	

/* titles */
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content h3.text1 {font-size:1.8em; font-weight:bold; line-height: 1.2em; text-transform: uppercase;} 
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content h3.text2 {font-size:1.6em; font-weight:bold; line-height: 1.2em;} 
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content h3.text3 {font-size:1.4em; font-weight:bold; line-height: 1.2em; } 
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content h3.text4 {font-size:1.2em; font-weight:bold; line-height: 1.1em; text-shadow:-1px -1px 0 #fff, 1px -1px 0 #fff, -1px 1px 0 #fff, 1px 1px 0 #fff;}
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content h3.text5 {font-size:1.2em; font-weight:bold; line-height: 1.1em; margin-bottom: 1em; padding-bottom: 0.6em; margin-left: -0.5em; padding-left: 0.5em; background-image: linear-gradient(to right, #ff98ea 0% , #c572ff 20%, #655cfc 40%, #00ffff 60%, #f0ffc4 80%, #ff98ea 100%)}
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content h3.text6 {font-size:1.2em; font-weight:bold; line-height: 1.1em; background: linear-gradient(to right, #e1a93a, #ffe1ab, #ce9d45, #ffe1ab, #e1a93a);color: #f2c673; -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; text-shadow: 0 0 0 rgb(255 255 255 / 10%);}
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content h3.text7 {font-size:1.2em; font-weight:bold; line-height: 1.1em; text-shadow: 2px 3px 5px #121212;}



#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content .font1 {font-size:1em; font-weight:bold;}

#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content .font2 {font-size:2.8em; font-weight:bold; text-transform: uppercase;}
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content .font3 {font-size:1.6em; font-weight:100;}
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content .font4 {font-size:1em; font-weight:bold;}
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content .filter1 {filter: brightness(0) invert(1);}

/* Make Circle */
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content .font5 {height:1.3em; width:1.3em; border-radius: 50%; display: inline-block; border:1px solid gray; text-align:center;}



/* Sellpoints */	
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .feature_detail {font-size:1.6em;text-align:center; padding:30px; text-align:center; margin-bottom:10px; background-color:#C4AE89; color:white; }
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .feature_detail span {padding:0 15px; border-right:2px solid white; line-height:1.8em;}
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .feature_detail span:last-child {border-right:none;}


/* divider*/
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content .dividervc {width:100%; height:1em; border-top:0.1em solid #d4d4d4; margin:0.3em auto; }
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content .dividervc1 {background-image:linear-gradient(90deg, #ff8500, #d1050c, #7328cd); height:5px;}
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content .dividervc2 {width:100%; height:1em; border-top:0.1em solid #d4d4d4; margin:0.3em 0; } 
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .dot {height: 5px; width: 5px; background-color: #bbb; border-radius: 50%; display: inline-block;}


/* headers */
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content .section_head1 {border-bottom: 1px solid #000000; color:#ffffff; clear: both; height:28px; margin:20px auto; width: 100%; text-align:center; margin-top:3em;}	
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content .section_head1 span {background-color:#000000; font-size:1.6em; line-height:42px; padding:5px 23px; }	
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content .section_head2 {font-size:1.4em; text-align:center; padding:10px; margin-bottom:10px; background-color:#008ea0; color:white;}	
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content .section_head3 {margin: 0px auto 20px; padding: 10px 0px 10px 15px; border-left: 12px solid #00693C; background: #EFEFEF none repeat scroll 0% 0%; color: #00693C;text-align: left;font-size: 1.3em;font-weight: bold;}
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content .section_head4 {background-color: #32d5df; /* For browsers that do not support gradients */ background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom right, #32d5df, #3adf32); /* Standard syntax (must be last) */ padding:1em;} 

 
/* Big box */
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_module {position: relative; padding: 0; overflow: hidden;}
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_info p {display: block; margin: 0.5em 0;}



/* Image box */
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_img {margin: 0 auto; padding: 0;}
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_img img {display: block; margin: auto; max-width: 100%;}
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_img + .a_plus_info { margin: 0; }
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_img img.cover1 {min-width:100%;}

#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content .txt_align_center {text-align: center; }
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content .txt_align_left {text-align:left;}
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content .txt_align_right {text-align:right;}
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content .txt_align_left img,
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content .txt_align_right img,
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content .txt_align_center img {margin-right:5px; max-width:100%;}
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_info img {max-width:100%;}
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content .vertical_align_center {display: inline-flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; }


/* List */
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_info ul,
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_info ol { margin: 1em 0; }
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_info ul {list-style-type: disc; list-style-position: outside;	padding-left: 25px;}
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_info li { margin-bottom: 1em; list-style-image: url("//c1.neweggimages.com/BizIntell/item/ACCS%20-%20PC/Liquid%20Water%20Cooling/35-846-069/65.jpg")}
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_info li:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }



/* group */
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_group { margin: 1em 0; }
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_group:first-child { margin-top: 0; }
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_group:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }


/* table styles */
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 table.table1 {width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse;}

/* Zebra striping */
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 tr.row1:nth-of-type(odd) {background: #eee;}
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 th.head1 {background: #333; color: white; font-weight: bold; }
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 td.column1, 
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 th.head1 {padding: 10px; border: 1px solid #ccc; text-align: left;}


/* note */
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .has_note {font-size:1.1em; font-weight:bold; text-align:left;}
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .note_detail {font-size:0.9em; font-style:italic; }


/* space */
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content .space1 {margin-top:1em;}
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content .space2 {margin-top:2em;}
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content .space3 {margin-top:3em;}
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content .space0 {margin-top:0;}
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content .space0b {margin-bottom:0;}
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content .space1b {margin-bottom:1em;}
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content .space2b {margin-bottom:2em;}
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content .space3b {margin-bottom:3em;}
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content .padding1 {padding-top:1em;}
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content .padding2 {padding-top:2em;}
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content .padding3 {padding-top:3em;}
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content .padding1b {padding-bottom:1em;}
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content .padding2b {padding-bottom:2em;}
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_content .padding3b {padding-bottom:3em;}


/* background color */
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .bgcolor1 {display: inline-flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; text-align: center; padding: 1.75em 0.5em; border-radius: 0.5em; background-color: #e6edf7;}

#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .bgcolor2 {background-color:black;}
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .bgcolor3 {background-color:#659747;}
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .bgcolor4 {background-color:#1657e7;}
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .bgcolor5 {background:linear-gradient(180deg, #fff 50%, #54585a 50%); }
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .bgcolor6 {background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4); color:white; padding:3em 2em; }



/* font color */
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .color1 {color:#f16522; font-size:1em;}


#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .color2 {-webkit-text-stroke: 1.5px #fff; color:black;position: relative;margin: 0 0 0.2em 0; text-transform: uppercase; padding-top:2em;}
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .color3 {background: linear-gradient(to right, #00A0E9, #E4007F); background-clip: text; color: rgba(0,0,0,0);}
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .color4 {background: linear-gradient(90deg, #6AC6FF 19%, #BF00A5 96%); color: rgba(0,0,0,0);background-clip: text;}
	
	/* colorful font and colorful border */
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .color5 {font-size:1em; font-weight:bold; padding:0.2em; background: linear-gradient(to right, #07c5ff, #4419fe, #f102e1, #ff0054, #e0ff00, #47ff00); background-clip: text; color: rgba(0,0,0,0); border: 2px solid transparent;border-image:linear-gradient(to right, #07c5ff, #4419fe, #f102e1, #ff0054, #e0ff00, #47ff00);border-image-slice: 1; font-style:italic;}


#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .a_plus_cell .a_plus_info {padding-top:1em; }

/* Different border */

#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .border1 {margin: 20px auto 0px; width: 76%; border: 2px solid transparent;border-image: linear-gradient(to bottom right, rgb(0 0 0 / 70%) 0%, rgb(252 44 44 / 65%) 25%, rgb(255 106 247 / 78%) 50%, rgb(254 200 55 / 86%) 75%, rgb(0 0 0 / 70%) 100%); border-image-slice: 1;}

#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .border2 {border-radius:25px;}

<!-- Carousal -->
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .mySlides {display: none}

#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .mySlides img {vertical-align: middle;}

/* Slideshow container */
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .slideshow-container {max-width: 95%; position: relative; margin: auto;}

/* Next & previous buttons */
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .prev, 
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .next {cursor: pointer; position: absolute; top: 50%; width: auto; padding: 16px; margin-top: -22px;color: white;font-weight: bold;font-size: 18px;transition: 0.6s ease;border-radius: 0 3px 3px 0; user-select: none;}

/* Position the "next button" to the right */
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .next {right: 0; border-radius: 3px 0 0 3px;}

/* On hover, add a black background color with a little bit see-through */
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .prev:hover, 
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .next:hover {background-color: rgba(0,0,0,0.8);}

/* Caption text */
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .text {color: #f2f2f2; font-size: 15px; padding: 8px 12px; position: absolute; bottom: 8px; width: 100%; text-align: center;}

/* Number text (1/3 etc) */
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .numbertext {color: #f2f2f2; font-size: 12px; padding: 8px 12px; position: absolute; top: 0;}

/* The dots/bullets/indicators */
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .dot {cursor: pointer; height: 15px; width: 15px;margin: 0 2px;background-color: #bbb; border-radius: 50%; display: inline-block; transition: background-color 0.6s ease;}
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .active, 
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .dot:hover {background-color: #717171;}

/* Fading animation */
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .fade {animation-name: fade; animation-duration: 1.5s;}
#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 @keyframes fade {from {opacity: .4} to {opacity: 1}}

#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 td.column1:nth-of-type(T):before { content:url(//c1.neweggimages.com/BizIntell/item/ACCS%20-%20PC/Liquid%20Water%20Cooling/35-846-069/1_01.jpg); }

<!-- Video Columns -->

#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .video-grid {
 display: grid;
 grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
 gap: 10px;
 width: 98%;
	margin:2em auto;
}

#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .video-item {
	align-items: center; 
	justify-content: center; 
 border: 1px solid #ccc;
 border-radius: 5px;
 overflow: hidden;
	display: inline-flex; 
	flex-direction: column; 
}

#overview-content.sku-35-846-069 .video-item iframe {
 width: 100%;
 height: 600px; /* Adjust the height as needed */
}

<div id="overview-content" class="sku-35-846-069">
 <article class="a_plus_content">
	
		
		<div class="a_plus_module">
			<div class="a_plus_img image1">
				<img class="cover1" src="//c1.neweggimages.com/BizIntell/item/ACCS%20-%20PC/Liquid%20Water%20Cooling/35-846-069/1.jpg" alt="MAG Coreliquid A13 360 Liquid Cooler">
			</div>
			<div class="a_plus_img image2">
				<img class="cover1" src="//c1.neweggimages.com/BizIntell/item/ACCS%20-%20PC/Liquid%20Water%20Cooling/35-846-069/1b1.jpg" alt="MAG Coreliquid A13 360 Liquid Cooler">
			</div>
			<div class="a_plus_img image2">
				<img class="cover1" src="//c1.neweggimages.com/BizIntell/item/ACCS%20-%20PC/Liquid%20Water%20Cooling/35-846-069/1b2.jpg" alt="MAG Coreliquid A13 360 Liquid Cooler">
			</div>
		</div>
		
		<div class="a_plus_module space1">
			<div class="a_plus_info width3 txt_align_center">
				<h3 class="a_plus_title text1">
					SIMPLY RADIANT
				</h3>
				<p>The MAG CORELIQUID A13 Series cooler draws its design inspiration from the harmonious balance between square and round elements. The design seamlessly combines soft rounded edges with sharp, clean lines, reflecting the perfect blend of performance and silence.</p>
			</div>
		</div>
		
		



		<div class="a_plus_module space3 padding3">
		</div>
		
		
		
		<div class="a_plus_group vw1">
			<div class="a_plus_cell col-6 margin2">
				<div class="a_plus_module">
					<div class="a_plus_img">
						<img src="//c1.neweggimages.com/BizIntell/item/ACCS%20-%20PC/Liquid%20Water%20Cooling/35-846-069/2.jpeg" alt="MAG Coreliquid A13 360 Liquid Cooler">
					</div>
					<div class="a_plus_info">
						<h3 class="a_plus_title text2">
							Full CPU Coverage
						</h3>
						<p>The new generation full-plane copper base eliminates the traditional screw perforation design, significantly enhancing water-tightness and ensuring more reliable system operation. Equipped with a precise 0.1mm micro-channel design, it efficiently absorbs CPU heat and works in tandem with the high-performance pump to quickly dissipate heat, delivering exceptional cooling performance.</p>
					</div>
				</div>
			</div>
			


			<div class="a_plus_cell col-6 margin2">
				<div class="a_plus_module">
					<div class="a_plus_img">
						<img src="//c1.neweggimages.com/BizIntell/item/ACCS%20-%20PC/Liquid%20Water%20Cooling/35-846-069/3.jpeg" alt="MAG Coreliquid A13 360 Liquid Cooler">
					</div>
					<div class="a_plus_info">
						<h3 class="a_plus_title text2">
							Improved Water Channel Design
						</h3>
						<p>Improved water channel design works seamlessly with the high-flow pump, efficiently dissipating the heat absorbed by the copper base. This ensures excellent cooling performance, keeping the system cool and stable even under heavy loads, elevating both performance and reliability to new heights.</p>
					</div>
				</div>
			</div>
			


		</div>
		
		
		<div class="a_plus_module space3 padding3">
		</div>
		
		
		
		<div class="a_plus_group vw1">
			<div class="a_plus_cell col-6 margin2">
				<div class="a_plus_module">
					<div class="a_plus_img">
						<img src="//c1.neweggimages.com/BizIntell/item/ACCS%20-%20PC/Liquid%20Water%20Cooling/35-846-069/4.jpeg" alt="MAG Coreliquid A13 360 Liquid Cooler">
					</div>
					<div class="a_plus_info">
						<h3 class="a_plus_title text2">
							Minimalism Meets Illumination
						</h3>
						<p>Through MSI Center, ARGB GEN2 lighting effects are easily controlled, with indirect lighting subtly integrated into the curved grooves, creating a vibrant interplay of colors and shadows that highlights the product's understated and refined design. The frosted exterior finish perfectly complements the steel-gray painted cover, with only the semi-transparent MSI logo exposed. The light from the logo harmonizes with the rounded corners, delivering an exquisite visual experience.</p>
					</div>
				</div>
			</div>

			<div class="a_plus_cell col-6 margin2">
				<div class="a_plus_module">
					<div class="a_plus_img">
						<img src="//c1.neweggimages.com/BizIntell/item/ACCS%20-%20PC/Liquid%20Water%20Cooling/35-846-069/5.jpeg" alt="MAG Coreliquid A13 360 Liquid Cooler">
					</div>
					<div class="a_plus_info">
						<h3 class="a_plus_title text2">
							CycloBlade 7 hybrid blade design
						</h3>
						<p>MSI's CycloBlade 7 fan features a hybrid blade design, delivering powerful airflow and high static pressure. This ensures extreme cooling performance during intense gaming while maintaining low noise levels for an immersive experience. Additionally, the ARGB GEN2 lighting effects make your rig stand out on the battlefield, making it the ultimate choice for esports players.</p>
					</div>
				</div>
			</div>
		</div>

		
		<div class="a_plus_module space3 padding3">
		</div>
		
		
		
		<div class="a_plus_group vw1">
			<div class="a_plus_cell col-6 margin2">
				<div class="a_plus_module">
					<div class="a_plus_img">
						<img src="//c1.neweggimages.com/BizIntell/item/ACCS%20-%20PC/Liquid%20Water%20Cooling/35-846-069/6.jpeg" alt="MAG Coreliquid A13 360 Liquid Cooler">
					</div>
					<div class="a_plus_info">
						<h3 class="a_plus_title text2">
							Split-Flow Radiator
						</h3>
						<p>The aluminum radiator employs a <span class="font1">12-channel, split-flow design </span>that divides incoming heated water and outgoing cooled water into two 6-channel paths. This improves thermal dissipation between coolant and fan-cooled air.</p>
						<p>Tubing comprises of <span class="font1">multi-layered netted plastic</span> concealed beneath reinforced mesh sheathing to ensure that coolant stays inside the closed-loop system at all times.</p>
					</div>
				</div>
			</div>


			<div class="a_plus_cell col-6 margin2">
				<div class="a_plus_module">
					<div class="a_plus_img">
						<img src="//c1.neweggimages.com/BizIntell/item/ACCS%20-%20PC/Liquid%20Water%20Cooling/35-846-069/7.jpeg" alt="MAG Coreliquid A13 360 Liquid Cooler">
					</div>
					<div class="a_plus_info">
						<h3 class="a_plus_title text2">
							Fan with RIFLE Bearing
						</h3>
						<p>By improving the lubrication system of traditional oil bearings, Rifle bearings use a spiral groove design to distribute the lubricant more evenly inside the bearing. This reduces friction and wear, extending the fan's lifespan.</p>
					</div>
				</div>
			</div>
			
			


		</div>
		
		
		
		<div class="a_plus_module space3 padding3">
		</div>
		
		
		
		<div class="a_plus_group vw1">
			<div class="a_plus_cell col-6 margin2">
				<div class="a_plus_module">
					<div class="a_plus_img">
						<img src="//c1.neweggimages.com/BizIntell/item/ACCS%20-%20PC/Liquid%20Water%20Cooling/35-846-069/8.jpeg" alt="MAG Coreliquid A13 360 Liquid Cooler">
					</div>
					<div class="a_plus_info">
						<h3 class="a_plus_title text2">
							MSI Center Optimization
						</h3>
						<p>MSI Center software unlocks multiple cooling profiles as well as customizable fan curve settings through an MSI motherboard:</p>
						<ul>
							<li>Silent, Game Mode, and Balanced profiles</li>
							<li>Customizable radiator fan speed curves</li>
						</ul>
					</div>
				</div>
			</div>

			<div class="a_plus_cell col-6 margin2">
				<div class="a_plus_module">
					<div class="a_plus_img">
						<img src="//c1.neweggimages.com/BizIntell/item/ACCS%20-%20PC/Liquid%20Water%20Cooling/35-846-069/9.jpeg" alt="MAG Coreliquid A13 360 Liquid Cooler">
					</div>
					<div class="a_plus_info">
						<h3 class="a_plus_title text2">
							Intel & AMD Compatible
						</h3>
						<p>Supported Intel CPU socket types: LGA 1700, 1851(pre-installed)</p>
						<p>Supported AMD CPU socket types: AM4, AM5</p>
						<p>Includes thermal paste, mounting screws and cables.</p>
					</div>
				</div>
			</div>
		</div>

		
		<div class="a_plus_module space3 padding3">
		</div>

 </article>
</div>

Description.Title: MSI MAG Coreliquid A13 360 Black - AIO ARGB Liquid Cooling - 360mm Radiator - Triple 120mm ARGB PWM Fans - EZ Connect - LGA 1700/1851/AM5/AM4 Compatible
Description.BulletDescription:
Minimalist Design: Embracing the philosophy of simplicity, with clean lines that embody the essence of "less is more. “
Ring Blade Design: Focuses airflow and
reduces noise.
The fan design uses Rifle bearings, which effectively reduce fan noise and increase operational lifespan.
ARGB GEN2: Customize the perfect lighting effects for you through MSI CENTER.
EPDM Tubing: Durable and effective in preventing coolant evaporation.
Pre-installed Fans: Saves gamers installation time and enhances the assembly experience.
Easy installation: Pre-installed Intel Bracket (1700/1851)

htmlContent.policyDesc1: My Trade-in is fully functional and undamaged and has the original serial label.
htmlContent.policyDesc2: My trade-in model matches or at least fully contains all digits of the model # selected.
htmlContent.policyInfo1: Trade In GPUs are inspected for, but are not limited to, the following: Item and model verification, physical damage, signs of tampering, excessive buildup, missing parts, rust or corrosion, serial numbers, port functionality, fan functionality, excessive noise or whine, temperature readings, and benchmarks. Trade-ins that fail any of our inspections may be rejected.
htmlContent.policyInfo2:
Either of the following is considered as a matching model #

  • Trade-in model # matches the selected model # exactly

  • Trade-in model # has additional digits, but fully contains the selected model #

    • i.e. Model # ROG-STRIX-RTX3060-O12G-V2-GAMING matches selected model # ROG-STRIX-RTX3060-O12G-GAMING
    • i.e. Model # GV- N3060VISION OC-12GD REV 2.0 matches selected model # GV-N3060VISION OC-12GD

htmlContent.policyDesc1: My Trade-in is fully functional and undamaged and has the original serial label.
htmlContent.policyDesc2: My trade-in model exactly matches the model selected.
htmlContent.policyInfo1: Trade In CPUs are inspected for, but are not limited to, the following: Item and model verification, physical damage, signs of tampering, excessive buildup, missing parts, rust or corrosion, serial numbers, port functionality, fan functionality, excessive noise or whine, temperature readings, and benchmarks. Trade-ins that fail any of our inspections may be rejected.

htmlContent.policyDesc1: I entered the full model # displayed on the product label sticker
htmlContent.policyDesc2: My trade-in is a complete set with matching original product label stickers on each stick
htmlContent.policyDesc3: The specs of my trade-in matches the specs stated in the product title exactly
htmlContent.policyDesc4: My trade-in matches the product image displayed exactly
htmlContent.policyDesc5: My trade-in is fully functional, unmodified, and undamaged
htmlContent.policyDesc6: I acknowledge my trade-in must pass diagnostic and stability testing. Items that fail testing will not be accepted.

CustomerReviewList.ItemDescription: MSI MAG Coreliquid A13 240 Black - AIO ARGB Liquid Cooling - 240mm Radiator - Dual 120mm ARGB PWM Fans - EZ Connect - LGA 1700/1851/AM5/AM4 Compatible

ProductImageInfo.ImageTitle: MSI MAG Coreliquid A13 240 Black - AIO ARGB Liquid Cooling - 240mm Radiator - Dual 120mm ARGB PWM Fans - EZ Connect - LGA 1700/1851/AM5/AM4 Compatible

CustomerReviewList.Title: Highly recommended
CustomerReviewList.Comments: This liquid cooler was really simple to install with CPU and motherboard. The CPU temperature runs below 60° when I did a 100% utilization stress test. The greatest part is that all the fans are pre-installed. It helps me to save some time when i'm building the PC. I was looking for a liquid cooling and my friend recommended MSI. After i use it for a while, i would recommend them as well especially when it's at such a good price point!

VendorReplayInfo.Content:
Dear Valued Customer,

Thank you for sharing your experience with the MSI MAG CoreLiquid A13 240. If you ever require technical assistance, please feel free to contact our technical support department directly at 888.447.6564 from M to F, 5am to 4am Pacific Standard Time.

Thanks for choosing MSI!

Best Regards,
MSI Review Team | usreview@msi.com

ProductImageInfo.ImageTitle: MSI MAG Coreliquid A13 360 Black - AIO ARGB Liquid Cooling - 360mm Radiator - Triple 120mm ARGB PWM Fans - EZ Connect - LGA 1700/1851/AM5/AM4 Compatible

CustomerReviewList.Title: Factory brackets
CustomerReviewList.Comments: Overall this is exactly what most builders need and priced very competitively.
CustomerReviewList.Pros:
All fans pre installed
RGB
Easy cable management
New user friendly
CustomerReviewList.Cons: The only con I have is the brackets from the factory are installed on the pump without any notification that it will only work with certain motherboards. In other words I had to figure it out on my own that I had to remove them and put the other set on before it would fit on my motherboard. Leave all brackets off from factory or specify which brackets work with the type of motherboard you're using better.

CustomerReviewList.ItemDescription: MSI MAG Coreliquid A13 360 Black - AIO ARGB Liquid Cooling - 360mm Radiator - Triple 120mm ARGB PWM Fans - EZ Connect - LGA 1700/1851/AM5/AM4 Compatible

CustomerReviewList.Title: very DIY friendly
CustomerReviewList.Comments: with pre install FANS this is very easy to install, completely DIY friendly it also fits both AMD/INTEL CPU. Easy connection too!

CustomerReviewList.Title: Great AIO Cooler from a Trusted Brand
CustomerReviewList.Comments: I'd recommend this AIO cooler to anyone looking to get a satisfactory cooling solution from one of the big brands in PC component hardware. Their warranty length is decent, and I've had no issues working with their support whenever I've had to in the past.
CustomerReviewList.Pros:
- Easy to set up and use out of the box
- Decent value for an AIO Cooler from a manufacturer that has a good reputation for these.
- RGB if you're into that kind of thing
CustomerReviewList.Cons: - Other, more performant options exist for about the same price

VendorReplayInfo.Content:

Thank you for sharing your experience with the MSI MAG CoreLiquid A13 360 WHITE! If you ever require technical assistance, please feel free to contact our technical support department directly at 888.447.6564 from M to F, 5am to 4am Pacific Standard Time.

CustomerReviewList.ItemDescription: MSI MAG Coreliquid A13 360 Black - AIO ARGB Liquid Cooling - 360mm Radiator - Triple 120mm ARGB PWM Fans - EZ Connect - LGA 1700/1851/AM5/AM4 Compatible

ProductImageInfo.ImageTitle: MSI MAG Coreliquid A13 360 Black - AIO ARGB Liquid Cooling - 360mm Radiator - Triple 120mm ARGB PWM Fans - EZ Connect - LGA 1700/1851/AM5/AM4 Compatible

CustomerReviewList.Title: Perform well
CustomerReviewList.Comments: I installed the MSI E360 liquid cooler in a computer I built for a friend, and it has performed excellently to this day. So this time, I chose MSI's liquid cooler again. It looks similar to the square-shaped E360, but many details have been improved, such as better-performing fans and simplified cables. Overall, it's a well-designed device that provides a great experience.

CustomerReviewList.ItemDescription: MSI MAG Coreliquid A13 240 White - AIO ARGB Liquid Cooling - 240mm Radiator - Dual 120mm ARGB PWM Fans - EZ Connect - LGA 1700/1851/AM5/AM4 Compatible

ProductImageInfo.ImageTitle: MSI MAG Coreliquid A13 240 White - AIO ARGB Liquid Cooling - 240mm Radiator - Dual 120mm ARGB PWM Fans - EZ Connect - LGA 1700/1851/AM5/AM4 Compatible

CustomerReviewList.Title: Pump Stopped Working
CustomerReviewList.Comments: Im not sure if i just got a bad one or not but it worked great for a while then my pc kept shutting off and whatnot then figured out the water wasnt pumping through it anymore im trying to get a new one through msi as i type this. The fans still spun and it still lights up it just wont cool the cpu at all now :( This came with my i5 14600K.
CustomerReviewList.Pros: It looks great ran great while it did :/
CustomerReviewList.Cons: the pump stopped working after a couple months.

VendorReplayInfo.Content:
Dear Valued Customer,

If you ever require technical assistance, please feel free to contact our technical support department directly at 888.447.6564 from M to F, 5am to 4am Pacific Standard Time.

Thanks for choosing MSI!

Best Regards,

CustomerReviewList.ItemDescription: MSI MAG Coreliquid A13 240 Black - AIO ARGB Liquid Cooling - 240mm Radiator - Dual 120mm ARGB PWM Fans - EZ Connect - LGA 1700/1851/AM5/AM4 Compatible

ProductImageInfo.ImageTitle: MSI MAG Coreliquid A13 240 Black - AIO ARGB Liquid Cooling - 240mm Radiator - Dual 120mm ARGB PWM Fans - EZ Connect - LGA 1700/1851/AM5/AM4 Compatible

CustomerReviewList.Title: Works well!
CustomerReviewList.Comments: I was skeptical about this cooler at first. It was bundled with my 7800x3d. But figured at most i could just get a 280 or 360 down the road. But since building, my cpu rarely hits Higher than the 60s c, usually in 50c-60c range when gaming. My case is the Monteck king 95 pro, so i have plenty of room for a bigger aio but with as well as this has worked so far i will continue to use it.

QaQuestions.Question: Where did you buy the screws needed to mount the AIO to the case? My AIO didn't ship with any, and of course the case wouldn't have any.

Answers.Answer: The fans were already mounted I has to take off the Intel bracket and put on the Amd as for the mounting screws it should have come in the box the package is kind of small make sure to look really good I had to flip my box upside down to find them.

QaQuestions.Question: So, they're gonna package this in a bundle with an AM5 CPU and it doesn't include the proper bracket?

Answers.Answer: Hi mate, you need to install it yourself, it comes with a package with the proper AMD bracket, you just need to lose the screws a little bit and take the Intel ones out and put the AMDs, but its tricky that it doesnt have a manual.

QaQuestions.Question: I see all the recent reviews about no AM5 bracket. If i order now, can i get confirmation it will have it or how can i get one? Seems stupid if it's bundled with the 9800 x3d

Answers.Answer: Mine came with one. So far it seems to be doing a good job. I got the same bundle you're looking at.

QaQuestions.Question: Can this cooling unit be front mounted?

Answers.Answer: Yes, depending on the case. Either orientation is fine.

QaQuestions.Question: Does this come with thermal paste or the something similar?
